MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY LEE, TONY  ENROLLED AGENT AS TO DEFENDANT Q.D. PADDERSON (USA) GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, TONY  ENROLLED AGENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT Q.D. PADDERSON (USA) GROUP, INC. $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,471.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,608.36 AS TO DEFENDANT Q.D. PADDERSON (USA) GROUP, INC.
CERT MAIL TO AUTH AGENT Q.D. PADDERSON USA GROUP RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT Q.D. PADDERSON (USA) GROUP, INC.
